ground_truth.title: Professional Certificate Programs
ground_truth.main_content:
Earn Your Certificate Your Way
Are you looking to become certified to advance you in your career or earn a certification to prepare for a national exam? No matter the reason, our online learning programs can help you become certified in a multitude of fields. We have partnered with nationally recognized online learning providers to support your educational needs. Our programs range from healthcare, business, fitness, management/corporate, media and design, skilled trades, and much more.

Open access
Learn from anywhere with Internet access.

Get certified
Earn a certificate online 24/7.

Support
Find the answers to your questions.

Financial Support for Military Spouses
Utilize military spouse benefits to get in-demand career training.
MY CAA

Don't Know What Certificate You Need?
Learn more about the certificates we offer through partnerships with leading program providers such as Ed2Go, CareerStep, and many more!

Ed2go
Learn more about the certificates we offer to help you reach your educational/career goals.

CareerStep
Learn more about the certificates we offer to help you reach your educational/career goals.

LEGAL STUDIES REAL ESTATE

Career Training Certificate Programs
We offer in-depth, career training courses in association with Ed2go, the world's largest provider of online, instructor-supported training to colleges and universities.
Learn more...
Career Training Certificate Programs
You can begin these courses whenever you'd like since there are no set start dates. These web-based programs are designed to provide the skills necessary to acquire professional caliber positions for many in-demand occupations, all within a three-month time frame. Coursework is completed independently, but instructors are actively involved in the students' online learning experience. They respond to any questions or concerns as well as encouraging and motivating students to succeed. Each program has a set of lessons and tests; grades are a combination of computer-graded tests and the instructor's evaluation of the students' work. Students love the quality as well as the convenience of anytime, anywhere learning. Gatlin Education Services has information about financial assistance options here.
Courses are offered in the following content areas: Business and Professional, Healthcare and Fitness, Hospitality, Gaming, Information Technology and Software Development, Management and Corporate, Media and Design, and Skilled Trades and Industrial. If you need more information contact us at (877) 221-5151.

Register for FGCU Career Training Certificate Programs

Learn More About Our Partnerships
Below you will find our partners and what they can offer to help you reach your educational goals!

Career Step
Florida Gulf Coast University has partnered with Career Step to help people like you train for a rewarding new career. Career Step is the premier provider of healthcare training, with an integrated technology platform that delivers quality, trusted learning content, continuing education, and certification management.

W.I.T.S.
All W.I.T.S. graduates are required to complete a minimum of 10 hours of study within a 2 year period to maintain their current status as a W.I.T.S. certified professional. Courses offered include: Personal Fitness Online, Business & Marketing Success Series, CEUs/CECs, and other certifications.

Ed2go (Self-Study)
In-depth, instructor-guided, career training certificate programs designed to help you achieve professional caliber positions for many occupations. Courses range from 12 to 580 hours and cost varies with programs in skilled trades, hospitality, business/professional, healthcare/fitness, information technology, software development, media and design.

Ed2go (Instructor-Facilitated)
Six-week professional development and training courses, many starting at $99. These course topics cover sales and marketing, accounting, law, healthcare, nutrition, fitness, business administration, database programming, graphic and web design, PC troubleshooting, networking and security, childcare and parenting, and courses for teaching professionals.

The Center for Legal Studies
The Center for Legal Studies is a legal education company focused on providing students the most affordable and effective legal education possible. Florida Gulf Coast University has partnered with the Center for Legal Studies to offer a multitude of legal studies courses in multiple formats including online, DVD, and text-only.

OnCourse Learning
Florida Gulf Coast University has partnered with OnCourse Learning to help individuals who want to earn their Florida Real Estate, Broker, Appraisal, or Home Inspection licenses. Programs include pre-license, post-license, and continuing education courses. Build the proper skills, be client-focused, and always stay up-to-date with these courses.

Explore More Online Learning Opportunities
